positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a celestial forest grove. Glowing, bioluminescent flora and fauna fill the scene, creating a tapestry of deep indigos, ethereal teals, and pops of vibrant magentas. The composition is symmetrical and centralized, featuring abstract, overlapping patterns of crescent moons, crystalline leaves, and stylized constellations interwoven with lush, stylized foliage. Focus on strong silhouettes and a high-contrast, nocturnal aesthetic suitable for apparel prints. Clean lines, vector quality, graphic novel inspiration, ethereal, vibrant.
negative: blurry, artifacts, signature, text, watermark, out of frame, messy, noise, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, low detail, jpeg artifacts
